title: ci: remove leftover Cirrus config after GHA migration
body:
## Problem

GHA is now the merge-blocking CI (`Total Success`, `validate`, etc.). Cirrus is no longer a required check.

These Cirrus leftovers remain on `main`:

- `.cirrus.yml`
- `.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml` (scheduled cron monitor, still calls podman's Cirrus cron workflow)
- `contrib/cirrus/` (`mac_cleanup.sh`, `ostree_ext.dockerfile`, `runner.sh`)

## Proposed fix

Remove the files above and any remaining references.

## Notes

- Coordinate with open PR #2725 (`Cirrus: use test-integration target`), which still touches `.cirrus.yml`.
- `hack/get_ci_vm.sh` and `hack/get_fqin.sh` were already removed in the GHA migration.
- Broader Cirrus → TMT work is tracked in #2633; this issue is specifically for deleting dead config now that GHA is blocking.
